themes.exampleQuote: get the raspberry lychee macaroon, it is gluten free made with almond flour and it is the best thing I've ever put in my mouth
Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed
Please do not miss this hidden gem in Pittsburgh
there are multiple locations so please make sure you check it out

notable_quote: Le Gourmandine can be put on any corner in Paris France and it would be packed.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently reach for superlatives about the pastry quality, especially the raspberry lychee macaron, with no recurring nitpicks surfacing across 525 reviews.
quarter_narrative: Thirty creators filmed La Gourmandine Hazelwood this quarter and collectively pulled over a million plays on TikTok. The bakery posted nothing to Instagram for the last 40 days of the period. That gap is the defining fact of its Spring 2026: a shop with 88 percent five-star reviews and a visual catalog strong enough to sit at the family median is essentially invisible on its own social channels while the city builds its feed for it. Page's holds the Pittsburgh Sweets lead this issue on the back of social momentum, exactly the axis where La Gourmandine is dormant. The path to closing that gap runs through one channel the business already has and one it hasn't touched.
tldr_read: Over a million TikTok plays from 30 creators, zero Instagram posts in 40 days. Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Pastry Shops.
tldr_meaning: Every signal axis except Instagram momentum is at or above the family median, so the rank ceiling is a posting cadence problem, not a quality or discovery problem.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: First In Pastry, Built By 30 Creators. The Bakery's Own Feed Is Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before next issue
playbook.action: The account has been silent 40 days. Even two posts per week would move the Instagram momentum signal off its current floor.

playbook.headline: Claim the TikTok presence creators built
playbook.action: 30 creators have logged 1,091,425 plays on this location. An owned account that reposts even one top video captures an audience already primed.

playbook.headline: Add video to the Google photo catalog
playbook.action: 304 photos across 11 categories is strong, but the Videos category is listed without depth. A short reel-length clip posted to Google would push the visual catalog above the family median.
